_comment: Standard DBS Masters BT booster box (24 packs x 12 cards) — confirmed live from TCGCSV Booster Box 'Description' extendedData for BT28 and BT31 ('Each ... Booster Pack contains 12 cards. Each ... Booster Box contains 24 Booster Packs.'). Per-pack filler composition (7 Common + 3 Uncommon + 1 Rare + 1 variable hit slot) is still an ESTIMATE. Special Rare, Special Leader Rare, and Concept Rare hitDistribution rates below are USER-CONFIRMED (2026-07-05) — see per-field _comment. Super Rare, Secret Rare, and God Rare remain community estimates aggregated from ProGamingCrew and BleedingCool 'Ultimate Squad' pull-rate research: Secret Rare ~1-2 per 12-box case, God Rare ~1 per 3-6 cases. ALL 4 supported sets (BT28-31) inherit these rates unchanged and stay flagged isPlaceholder=true until the filler composition and remaining 3 hit-tier rates are also confirmed. Override per-set via the in-UI Pull Rates modal, or replace these numbers once further box-break data is available.

Super Rare._comment: ~5 SR per box (community-cited guaranteed floor) — still an estimate

Special Rare._comment: user-confirmed: generally 1 SPR per box, but 25% of boxes have 2 -> expected 1.25/box (0.75x1 + 0.25x2)

Secret Rare._comment: ~1 SCR per 6 boxes (community: 1-2 per 12-box case) — still an estimate

God Rare._comment: ~1 GDR per 50 boxes (community: 1 per 3-6 cases = 36-72 boxes; midpoint used) — still an estimate
